node.html: AI-powered product experience that turns pet photos into personalized keepsakes through a clean upload-to-checkout flow. Built to make discovery, customization, and ordering feel simple while supporting real-time interactions and reliable commerce operations behind the scenes.

Culturally responsive mental healthcare platform designed to connect employees with therapists, coaches, and care resources. Focused on making a sensitive product area feel trustworthy, approachable, and operationally dependable for both users and care teams.

Mobile storytelling platform that helps creators and brands publish visually engaging, interactive stories across iOS and Android. Built around expressive content creation, smooth playback, and a polished product experience that keeps storytelling lightweight and shareable.
